summary: Iteration 16 — validated BOM UX refinements: required prepared_by, structured 409 revision_reason flow, /bom/preparers autocomplete, fuzzy q search across so_no/customer/project_name, detail meta card (Prepared By/Tanggal Upload/Diupload oleh), history dialog Pembuat BOM column, and admin remark textarea auto-grow. Backend: 10/10 pytest passed. Frontend E2E as engineer01 fully passed.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routers/bom.py upload: prepared_by required, 409 detail is a proper dict with code/so_no/latest_rev/latest_uploaded_by/latest_uploaded_at/latest_prepared_by/message — correct structure for frontend catch.

backend/routers/bom.py list_or_search_bom: `q` uses re.escape then $regex on so_no/customer/project_name with case-insensitive option — correct fuzzy substring; `so_no` exact-match branch preserved for backward compat.

frontend BOMPage.jsx: datalist#preparers-list is populated from /bom/preparers on mount; upload dialog reveals amber banner + reason input on 409, updates submit label to 'Upload sebagai Rev.<n>'; BomDetail meta card highlights Prepared By/Tanggal Upload/Diupload oleh; admin remark textarea uses ref callback to sync height=scrollHeight and display cells use whitespace-pre-wrap break-words. Implementation matches PRD.
seed_data_creation: SO 005221 gained Rev.4 (prepared_by='Andi Test', reason='iter16 auto test' from pytest) and Rev.5 (prepared_by='Andi Test', reason='iter16 e2e reason' from playwright). Preparers list now contains ['Andi Test','Sudirman'].
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend cookie-auth; env-based BASE_URL. Note: when running pytest manually, pytest.ini adds -n --dist loadscope (xdist parallel). If tests need env var override, pass REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL explicitly and use -o addopts= to disable parallel if needed. BOM.xls at /tmp/bom/BOM.xls is stable. SO 005221 latest rev is now Rev.5.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. All 6 spec items (prepared_by required, 409 flow, q search, wrap-text UI, meta display, MCL await) verified either via automated tests or code inspection.
